steps.code: <?php define('WP_USE_THEMES', false); require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php'; do_action('plugins_loaded'); do_action('init'); require_once 'wordpress/wp-content/plugins/graphic_data_plugin/includes/admin-tutorial-content.php'; if (class_exists('Graphic_Data_Tutorial_Content')) { $tutorial = new Graphic_Data_Tutorial_Content(); if (method_exists($tutorial, 'create_playground_tutorial_content')) { $tutorial->create_playground_tutorial_content(); update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'success'); } else { update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'error: Method create_playground_tutorial_content not found on Graphic_Data_Tutorial_Content.'); } } else { update_option('blueprint_setup_notice', 'error: Class Graphic_Data_Tutorial_Content not found. Plugin may not be active.'); } ?>
